lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi! What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Isn't it obvious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not really.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaghhaha! Ahem. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'm trying to smoke these pesky rats out. Ahem-hem-hem.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'll - ugh - I'll be fine, youngin'. My lungs just aren't up for ratcatchin' like they used to be.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaghhaha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ratcatching, you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could help you. I'm young-ish and my lungs are doing fine so far.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That's-

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaaghhaha!

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: -kind of you, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's up with your lungs anyway?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Years of blowin' smoke into rat holes, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. Speaking of rats...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You offered to help me out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's right! Me and my cat have been learning from the best of the best.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Sisters Grime, Jimmy Dazzler, Hooknosed Jack...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Blimey, that's my old crew! How are they all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Better now that I've helped them out, I think.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Now, how should I get rid of these rats?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That's sim-

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: bluaaghhaha...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: simple. Take this pot, light the contents, and blow the smoke into the hole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... this pot specifically?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Aye, this pot. What's wrong with it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a bit... phlegmy...

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You'd better make your own then. A-hem-hem.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Just take a simple pot and stick some ordinary garden weeds in it. Then light the pot and use it on a rat hole.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great. I'll get to it.

sections.title: Talking again before smoking out the rats

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Have you got that job done yet, youngin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's your cough?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Aheeh - hoo.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Better with you helpin' me out, youngin'.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Say, when the job's done, how about I show you to the Rat Pits here in Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That seems a fair deal. But I'd appreciate any pointers you could give me.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: An extra pair of eyes or set of claws can often come in handy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more straightforward hints?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Bluaaaghhaha! Hurk-!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind, I'll figure it out!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I got the rats.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well good - ahem - good show.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I'd better show you our rat pits here in Keldagrim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great stuff. Let's go.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: They're nice, but the ones they have in Port Sarim are even better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They have rat pits in Port Sarim?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Oh yes! It's the best place to train your wily cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wily cats?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well, I suppose there's no harm tellin' you.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: A-hem!

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Look for 'The Face' in Port Sarim. She'll show you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where are the Keldagrim rat pits then?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Down the stairs to the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. Get yourself a drink, too, you've earned it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Phingspet and Grimesquit?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah, the sisters Grime, as strange a pair as you're ever likely to meet.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You'll find them in the sewers of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Jimmy Dazzler?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah, young Jimmy, he must be a made man by now.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I remember when he was a lad...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you remember where to find him, too?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Hrmph! His old waterin' hole was the Flying Horse in Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That old brawler? Is he still knockin' about?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well, your best bet would be somewhere on the east side of Varrock. It's rough around there though, be careful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find 'The Face'?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You'll find her in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Felkrash?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah, the boss herself. You'll probably find her in the Port Sarim rat pits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the pits?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Here take this, you might find it useful.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: What do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any pointers for me and my cat?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would be the best tactic to adopt then?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will not risk my cat's life.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very defensive strategy

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself, cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less defensive strategy.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you are left with two choices.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In the Keldagrim pits, your cat will grow wiser by gaining more experience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find the rat pits in Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Down the stairs into the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. A grand waterin' hole it is. Just look for The Beast, you'll find it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yo, shortstuff!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Phingspet and Grimesquit?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah the sisters, as strange a pair as you're ever likely to meet.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: You're most likely to find them in the sewers of Varrock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I would find Jimmy Dazzler?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah young Jimmy, he must be a made man by now.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I remember when ...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I would find him or not?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Hrmph! The entrance to the pits of Ardougne are in the back of the Flying Horse in Ardougne.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: I doubt he would be too far away from there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find Hooknosed Jack?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: That old brawler? Is he still knocking about?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well your best bet would be somewhere on the rough side of Varrock, the east side if I remember correctly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I would find 'The Face'?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: What a tragedy, that girl.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Look for her in Port Sarim.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I would find Felkrash?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Ah, Queen Muck, you'll probably find her in the Port Sarim pits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the pits?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Here take this, you might find it useful

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Well what do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am willing to risk my cat, if it increases my chances of victory.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a very aggressive strategy

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe

lines.speaker: Player

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I would adopt a less aggressive strategy.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What benefits does my cat get from training in the pits?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: It depends on what kind of cat you have.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: In the Keldagrim pits, your cat will grow wiser by gaining more experience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Do you have any other questions about the pits?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I could find the rat pits in Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Smokin' Joe
lines.text: Try the stairs into the basement of the 'Laughing Miner'. A grand watering hole it is. My cat should be standing next to it.
